_datasheet_peak_flops_tf_note: Wave 20 (feedback #2): vendor datasheet dense Tensor-Core peaks, for implied-MFU reporting ONLY. The roofline model must keep using peak_flops_tf. On NVIDIA parts peak_flops_tf is ~half of these (see _peak_flops_tf_convention); on TPU/Trainium the two coincide.

notes.fused_efficiency_source: Pallas-based fused attention on v5e, 0.70-0.75 range
notes.hbm_bw_source: Google Cloud TPU v5e docs: 16 GB HBM2E at 819.2 GB/s per chip (the previous 1.6 TB/s figure was a 2x error; v5p is the 2.77 TB/s part)
notes.topology_note: v5e uses 2D ICI topology, smaller pods than v5p
notes.nvlink_domain_size_note: v5e 2D torus axis ~ 8 chips; cross-axis triggers the ICI penalty in _moe_alltoall_cost.
